market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the ultimate in luxury living with our spacious 4-bedroom entire home, perfectly suited for up to 8 guests. With its prime location and impeccable interior, this property is the epitome of comfort and style. Whether you're looking for a relaxing getaway or a hub for your city adventures, our home has everything you need to make your stay unforgettable.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be a well-lit and beautifully furnished living room, as it is often the first impression guests have of the property and can significantly impact their decision to book.
key_diagnosis: The listing's nightly rate of £1379.0 is 792% higher than the cohort median of £154.60, indicating a significant pricing gap that may be affecting occupancy.
The occupancy rate of 14.1% is substantially lower than the cohort median of 47.8%, suggesting a large room for improvement in attracting more guests.
With only 29 reviews and a rating of 4.59, there is an opportunity to improve the listing's credibility and appeal by encouraging more guests to leave reviews and increasing the overall rating.
analysis.outreach_hook: With your nightly rate being 792% higher than the cohort median and an occupancy rate of 14.1% compared to the cohort median of 47.8%, there is a significant opportunity to increase bookings and revenue by optimizing your listing.
